characters.name: Anne Marie
characters.description: Anne MarieSeason(s)4SpeciesHumanStatusAliveTitle/AliasBaby(byRick Deacon)AffiliationRick Deacon(boyfriend)†Sam WinchesterDean WinchesterPortrayed byCarmen Lavigne Anne Mariewas the girlfriend ofRick Deacon, she would later witness his death in late 2008. At some point in time, she began dating Rick. One night during Oktoberfest 2008, the two of them would go to a secluded to make out with Rick attempting to become sexual with her though Anne Marie refused to let him go further with Rick insisting he had to as if he didn't then things would go badly for him with Anne Marie refusing to believe that Rick would gain medical problems if he did not fully make out with her.

characters.name: Bobby McCatrick
characters.description: Bobby McCatrickComic book(s)Supernatural (2025)RaceHumanFirst seenSupernatural (2025) Issue 2StatusDeceased(unintentionally ran into an incoming car trying to escapeCallie Hernandez) Bobby McCatrickwas the owner of a casino in Las Vegas. In 1961, he was in league with a mobster named D'Angelo. That same year, he disposed of the body of showgirlCallie Hernandez. Bobby dumps Callie's body in a grave

characters.name: Danny
characters.description: DannySpeciesHumanStatusAliveOccupationBartender atHarvelle's Roadhouse(formerly)AffiliationHarvelle's RoadhouseEllen HarvelleJo HarvelleDannywas a bartender that worked at theHarvelle's Roadhouseuntil early 2001. At some point in time before 2001, Danny was hired byEllen Harvelleto work at the Roadhouse. On March 6, 2001,Jo Harvellewrote an entry inher blogabout how Danny left his job there but had been replaced by a new worker by the name ofMiles.[1]

characters.name: Fergus MacLeod

characters.name: Ichi
characters.description: IchiComic book(s)Supernatural: OriginsRaceHumanFirst seenSupernatural: Origins #3StatusDeceased(killed by aShapeshifter) Ichiwas an Americanhunterand frequent visitor of theHarvelle's Roadhouseduring the 1980s. He was killed by ashapeshifterin the form of aheelerin an attempt to helpJohn WinchesterandHunterfind ahellhoundso that John could understand what killed his wife,Mary Winchester. In 1982, Ichi encountered a Gray Lady in a graveyard which put him off entering one for the rest of the year.

characters.description: UnknownSeason(s)4SpeciesHumanStatusAliveOccupationPizza delivery guyAffiliationBig Bite PizzaUnnamed shapeshifter(customer)Four unnamed customersPortrayed byGiacomo Baessato This unnamed young manworked as a pizza delivery guy during late 2008. Prior to or in 2008, this young man gained a job at Big Bite Pizza where he worked as a delivery worker. One of his shifts took place on Oktoberfest of that same year with one of his customers being ashapeshifterunbeknownst to him.

characters.name: Queen Elizabeth
characters.description: Queen Elizabeth IISeason(s)NoneSpeciesLizard PeopleStatusDeceasedTitle/AliasQueen of EnglandOccupationQueen of England(formerly)AffiliationLizard peopleRoyal Family Queen Elizabeth II, born asElizabeth Alexandra Mary(21 April 1926 – 8 September 2022) was the Queen of the United Kingdom from February 6, 1952 until her death on September 8, 2022. She was part of theLizard Peoplewhich was a conspiracy theory until forcefully proven in 2019 byJack Klineusing hispowers.

characters.name: Ron Van Allen
characters.description: Ron Van AllenSeason(s)3SpeciesHumanStatusAliveFamilyRenee Van Allen(wife)†Portrayed byKen Tremblett Ron Van Allenwas the husband ofRenee Van Allen. At an unknown point in time, Ron began dating and eventually married Renee. By 2007, they had a house located in Sturbridge, Massachusetts which had a mortgage high enough to the point that Renee, along withElizabeth Higginsand the demonAstarothposing asTammi Fenton, attempted to have it lowered usingmagicwith Ron being unaware that his wife and her friends werewitches.

characters.description: ShawnSpeciesHumansStatusUnknownTitle/AliasUncle Shawn(byJo Harvelle)OccupationHunterAffiliationEllen HarvelleJo HarvelleOther hunters Shawnis ahunter. At some unknown point in time, Shawn got into hunting and eventually began visiting theHarvelle's Roadhousewhere he metEllen Harvelleand her daughterJo Harvelle. He would be known by the latter as "Uncle Shawn".

characters.name: Steff Windler
characters.description: Steff WindlerComic book(s)Supernatural (2025)RaceHumanFirst seenSupernatural (2025) Issue 1StatusAlive Steff "Effie" Windleris the C.E.O of Windler Enterprises. At an unknown point in time, Steff acquired the role of C.E.O at Windler Enterprises which was based in the town of Windler in the state of Michigan. Around this time, she developed an interest in the supernatural and did some research as she would later claim toSam Winchesterthat her company had always been interested in monetizing anything occult themed.

characters.name: Terry Marsh
characters.description: Terry MarshSeason(s)NoneSpeciesHumanStatusAliveOccupationHunter Terry Marshis ahunterwhoSamandDean Winchestermentioned in an effort to trick theBritish Men of Letters. When the Winchester brothers discovered theMen of Letters bunkerhad been wired so their enemies could listen in on their conversations, Sam and Dean tricked their British counterparts into believing they were meeting up with Terry at a warehouse during the elimination of many American hunters.

characters.name: Vessels/Known Vessels
characters.description:
ForCastiel:
Castiel's vessels are applicable through theNovak lineage. ForMichael:
All descendants of Cain and Abel are capable of successfully containing Michael without discomfort. ForUriel:
The requirements to host Uriel are unknown.

characters.name: Karen Walker
characters.description: Karen Walkerwas the sister ofAmanda Walker. Karen WalkerSeason(s)NoneSpeciesHumanStatusAliveOccupationStudentFamilyAmanda Walker(sister) Five minutes before she was due to start her job as a flight attendant for flight 424 in November of 2005, Amanda spoke with Karen who told her she was studying for her finals.
